key.name: extension-width
key.description: The width of the main extension popup menu in pixels.

key.name: extension-height
key.description: The height of the main extension popup menu in pixels.

key.name: hide-panel-icon
key.description: When enabled, the icon is hidden from the top panel. The extension can still be accessed via keyboard shortcuts.

key.name: remember-last-tab
key.description: When enabled, the menu will re-open to the last viewed tab instead of resetting to the default 'Recently Used' tab.

key.name: hidden-icon-position-mode
key.summary: Positioning mode when panel icon is hidden
key.description: Determines where the menu appears when opened via shortcut while the panel icon is hidden. Can be 'cursor', 'center', or 'window'.

key.name: enable-recents-tab
key.description: Controls the visibility of the main 'Recently Used' tab.

key.name: enable-emoji-tab
key.description: Controls the visibility of the main 'Emoji' tab.

key.name: enable-gif-tab
key.description: Controls the visibility of the main 'GIF' tab.

key.name: enable-kaomoji-tab
key.description: Controls the visibility of the main 'Kaomoji' tab.

key.name: enable-symbols-tab
key.description: Controls the visibility of the main 'Symbols' tab.

key.name: enable-clipboard-tab
key.description: Controls the visibility of the main 'Clipboard' tab.

key.name: always-show-main-tab
key.summary: Always show the main tab bar
key.description: Keep the top tab buttons visible even when opening full-view tabs such as Emoji or GIF. This provides an alternative navigation model.

key.name: hide-last-main-tab
key.summary: Hide tab bar when only one tab is active
key.description: Automatically hide the top tab bar if only one tab is enabled to reduce UI clutter.

key.name: default-tab
key.summary: The tab to open by default.
key.description: Defines which tab is opened when the menu is activated via the panel icon or main toggle shortcut.

key.name: tab-order
key.summary: The display order of the main tabs.
key.description: Stores the user-defined order for tabs in the main tab bar.

key.name: shortcut-next-tab
key.description: Shortcut to cycle to the next visible tab within the menu.

key.name: shortcut-prev-tab
key.description: Shortcut to cycle to the previous visible tab within the menu.

key.name: shortcut-next-category
key.description: Shortcut to cycle to the next category within a tab.

key.name: shortcut-prev-category
key.description: Shortcut to cycle to the previous category within a tab.

key.name: clipboard-key-select
key.description: Key to select a focused clipboard item.

key.name: clipboard-key-pin
key.description: Key to pin/star a focused clipboard item.

key.name: clipboard-key-delete
key.description: Key to delete a focused clipboard item.

key.name: emoji-grid-limit-columns
key.description: When enabled, caps the number of columns in the emoji grid.

key.name: emoji-grid-max-columns
key.description: Maximum number of columns to show in the emoji grid when the limit is enabled.

key.name: gif-grid-limit-columns
key.description: When enabled, caps the number of columns in the GIF masonry grid.

key.name: gif-grid-max-columns
key.description: Maximum number of columns to show in the GIF masonry grid when the limit is enabled.

key.name: kaomoji-grid-limit-columns
key.description: When enabled, caps the number of columns in the kaomoji grid.

key.name: kaomoji-grid-max-columns
key.description: Maximum number of columns to show in the kaomoji grid when the limit is enabled.

key.name: symbols-grid-limit-columns
key.description: When enabled, caps the number of columns in the symbols grid.

key.name: symbols-grid-max-columns
key.description: Maximum number of columns to show in the symbols grid when the limit is enabled.

key.name: clipboard-grid-limit-columns
key.description: When enabled, caps the number of columns in the clipboard masonry grid.

key.name: clipboard-grid-max-columns
key.description: Maximum number of columns to show in the clipboard masonry grid when the limit is enabled.

key.name: enable-auto-paste
key.description: When enabled, selected items will be automatically pasted instead of just copied to clipboard.

key.name: auto-paste-emoji
key.description: Automatically paste emojis when selected (requires master toggle).

key.name: auto-paste-gif
key.description: Automatically paste GIFs when selected (requires master toggle).

key.name: auto-paste-kaomoji
key.description: Automatically paste kaomojis when selected (requires master toggle).

key.name: auto-paste-symbols
key.description: Automatically paste symbols when selected (requires master toggle).

key.name: auto-paste-clipboard
key.description: Automatically paste items from clipboard history when selected (requires master toggle).

key.name: emoji-recents-max-items
key.description: The maximum number of recently used emojis to store and display in the Emoji 'Recents' tab.

key.name: gif-recents-max-items
key.description: The maximum number of recently used GIFs to store and display in the GIF 'Recents' tab.

key.name: kaomoji-recents-max-items
key.description: The maximum number of recently used kaomojis to store and display in the Kaomoji 'Recents' tab.

key.name: symbols-recents-max-items
key.description: The maximum number of recently used symbols to store and display in the Symbols 'Recents' tab.

key.name: enable-recently-used-search
key.summary: Show search in Recently Used tab
key.description: When enabled, displays a global search bar in the Recently Used tab to filter items across all visible sections.

key.name: recently-used-default-limit-mode
key.summary: Default limit mode in Recently Used
key.description: Default cap behavior used when custom limit policy by context is disabled.

key.name: recently-used-enable-custom-limit-policy
key.summary: Enable custom limit policy by context
key.description: When enabled, browse and search limit policies can be configured independently and override the global limit policy.

key.name: recently-used-history-limit-mode
key.summary: History limit mode in Recently Used
key.description: Controls cap behavior for non-search browsing context in Recently Used.

key.name: recently-used-search-limit-mode
key.summary: Search limit mode in Recently Used
key.description: Controls cap behavior for search context in Recently Used.

key.name: recently-used-default-display-mode
key.summary: Default display mode in Recently Used
key.description: Default display mode used by Recently Used policy resolution.

key.name: recently-used-enable-custom-display-mode
key.summary: Enable custom display mode by view
key.description: When enabled, list and grid display modes can be configured independently and override the global display mode.

key.name: recently-used-list-display-mode
key.summary: List display mode in Recently Used
key.description: Display mode applied to list view when custom display mode by view is enabled.

key.name: recently-used-grid-display-mode
key.summary: Grid display mode in Recently Used
key.description: Display mode applied to grid view when custom display mode by view is enabled.

key.name: recently-used-global-visible-items
key.summary: Global visible items in Recently Used
key.description: Global visible-items cap used when custom per-view visible items are disabled.

key.name: recently-used-enable-custom-visible-items
key.summary: Enable custom visible items by view
key.description: When enabled, list and grid visible-items caps can be configured independently and override the global visible-items cap.

key.name: recently-used-list-visible-items
key.summary: List visible items in Recently Used
key.description: Visible-items cap applied to list view when custom visible items by view is enabled.

key.name: recently-used-grid-visible-items
key.summary: Grid visible items in Recently Used
key.description: Visible-items cap applied to grid view when custom visible items by view is enabled.

key.name: recently-used-global-window-rows
key.summary: Global window rows in Recently Used
key.description: Global window-row limit used by list and grid when custom window limits by view are disabled.

key.name: recently-used-enable-custom-window-limits
key.summary: Enable custom window limits by view
key.description: When enabled, list and grid window limits can be configured independently and override global window rows.

key.name: recently-used-list-window-rows
key.summary: List window rows in Recently Used
key.description: Window-row limit applied to list view when custom window limits by view is enabled.

key.name: recently-used-grid-window-rows
key.summary: Grid window rows in Recently Used
key.description: Window-row limit applied to grid view when custom window limits by view is enabled.

key.name: recently-used-grid-window-columns
key.summary: Grid window columns in Recently Used
key.description: Window-column value applied to grid view when custom window limits by view is enabled.

key.name: recently-used-unlimited-safety-cap
key.summary: Unlimited safety cap in Recently Used
key.description: Maximum number of items allowed in Recently Used when limit mode is unlimited.

key.name: recently-used-advanced-section-overrides
key.description: Serialized object storing per-section Recently Used policy overrides to avoid schema key explosion.

key.name: enable-custom-skin-tones
key.description: Master switch to enable or disable custom skin tone configuration. If false, skinnable emojis will render in their neutral (yellow) form. If true, the 'Custom Skin Tone Primary' and 'Custom Skin Tone Secondary' settings will be used.

key.name: custom-skin-tone-primary
key.description: Sets the skin tone for single-person emojis, or the first person in a multi-person emoji, when 'Enable Custom Skin Tones' is active. Stores the Unicode skin tone modifier character.

key.name: custom-skin-tone-secondary
key.description: Sets the skin tone for the second person in a multi-person emoji, when 'Enable Custom Skin Tones' is active. Stores the Unicode skin tone modifier character.

key.name: gif-provider
key.description: The ID of the active GIF provider or disabled.

key.name: gif-custom-api-key
key.description: User-provided API key for the selected GIF provider.

key.name: gif-paste-behavior
key.description: Choose whether to paste GIF links (0) or the GIF image itself (1).

key.name: gif-cache-limit-mb
key.description: The maximum size for the GIF preview cache in megabytes. Set to 0 for unlimited cache size.

key.name: clipboard-history-max-items
key.summary: Maximum number of items in clipboard history
key.description: The maximum number of unpinned items to store in the clipboard history.

key.name: update-recency-on-copy
key.summary: Move item to top on copy
key.description: When an item is copied from the clipboard history, move it to the top of the list.

key.name: unpin-on-paste
key.description: When a pinned item is pasted, automatically unpin it and move it to the top of the history. If disabled, pinned items will remain pinned after pasting.

key.name: clipboard-show-action-bar
key.description: Show the top action bar in the Clipboard tab with select-all, layout, private mode, pin, and delete controls.

key.name: clipboard-layout-mode
key.description: Display mode for clipboard history items. Can be 'list' (compact rows) or 'grid' (masonry cards).

key.name: clipboard-image-preview-size
key.description: Sets the pixel size for clipboard image previews. Applies to the clipboard history tab and the recently used overview.

key.name: enable-clipboard-merge-selection
key.description: When enabled, allows selecting and merging multiple clipboard items.

key.name: clipboard-merge-selection-delimiter-type
key.description: The type of delimiter used to separate text items when merging selection.

key.name: clipboard-merge-selection-delimiter-custom
key.description: Custom string delimiter used when type is set to 'custom'.

key.name: clipboard-merge-selection-order
key.description: Order in which items are merged.

key.name: enable-atspi-exclusion
key.description: When enabled, uses the system accessibility service (AT-SPI) to detect excluded applications inside browser windows, such as password manager extension popups. This will enable the system accessibility service (toolkit-accessibility) if it is not already active.

key.name: excluded-applications
key.description: A list of applications or window classes (wm_class) that should be ignored by the clipboard manager.

key.name: excluded-addresses
key.description: A list of domains, URLs, or email addresses that should be ignored when fetching metadata.

key.name: clear-data-at-login
key.description: Master switch to enable the automatic clearing of history data when GNOME Shell starts.

key.name: clear-clipboard-history-at-login
key.description: When the master switch is enabled, this will clear the clipboard history at login.

key.name: clear-recent-emojis-at-login
key.description: When the master switch is enabled, this will clear the recent emojis list at login.

key.name: clear-recent-gifs-at-login
key.description: When the master switch is enabled, this will clear the recent GIFs list at login.

key.name: clear-recent-kaomojis-at-login
key.description: When the master switch is enabled, this will clear the recent kaomojis list at login.

key.name: clear-recent-symbols-at-login
key.description: When the master switch is enabled, this will clear the recent symbols list at login.

key.name: clear-recents-trigger
key.summary: Trigger to clear recent items data
key.description: Internal use only. Setting this to 'emoji', 'gif', 'kaomoji', 'symbols', or 'all' will trigger the extension to clear the corresponding cached recent items. It will be reset to empty after the action is performed.
